questions: What are Enhanced Conversions and why use them?
How do enhanced conversions improve measurement under privacy constraints?
qa.answer: Enhanced Conversions send hashed first‑party data (e.g., email, phone) to improve conversion matching, attribution, and bidding when cookies/signals are limited.
implication: Implement web and/or API enhanced conversions; ensure hashing and consent.
Validate with tag diagnostics; monitor match rates and modeled conversions.
Deduplicate events when also using offline imports or CAPI‑like flows.
